children.name: Dr Koh is Deputy Chief Medical Officer, co-overseeing clinical services in Jiahui Health, the large st private international healthcare ecosystem in Shanghai. He is actively involved in clinical operations and product development. He sits on various committees including privileging & credentialing, clinical standards, medical executive council, medical policies, peer review and he chairs the Jiahui vaccination and clinical products committees. Prior to joining Jiahui Health, Dr Koh was managing another medical group in China, responsible for all operations of the group’s healthcare assets, across 6 cities in China. He has worked previously in other major medical groups in Singapore and the Republic of Ireland and has been a practicing physician for over 20 years. Dr Koh has sat on and presided over Medical Boards and Clinical Governance committees in several medical groups, including public-listed Parkway Health and Healthway Medical Group in Singapore. He was actively involved in multiple large-scale projects in both B2B and B2G arenas, to enhance scope of clinical services and developing new business lines. After Parkway Health, Dr Koh was Vice-President, International Business Development, with focus on strategy and business development at Certis CISCO Pte Ltd, driving merger and acquisition activities.
children.characters:
Dr Koh is Deputy Chief Medical Officer, co-overseeing clinical services in Jiahui Health, the large st private international healthcare ecosystem in Shanghai. He is actively involved in clinical operations and product development. 

He sits on various committees including privileging & credentialing, clinical standards, medical executive council, medical policies, peer review and he chairs the Jiahui vaccination and clinical products committees.

Prior to joining Jiahui Health, Dr Koh was managing another medical group in China, responsible for all operations of the group’s healthcare assets, across 6 cities in China. 

He has worked previously in other major medical groups in Singapore and the Republic of Ireland and has been a practicing physician for over 20 years. 

Dr Koh has sat on and presided over Medical Boards and Clinical Governance committees in several medical groups, including public-listed Parkway Health and Healthway Medical Group in Singapore. 

He was actively involved in multiple large-scale projects in both B2B and B2G arenas, to enhance scope of clinical services and developing new business lines. 

After Parkway Health, Dr Koh was Vice-President, International Business Development, with focus on strategy and business development at Certis CISCO Pte Ltd, driving merger and acquisition activities.
